Login.title: Welcome back
Login.description: Sign in or create an account to connect OceanSkill to your agent workflow.
Login.resetSent: Check your email for a password reset link.
Login.signupDescription: Create an OceanSkill account to manage credits, skills, and MCP keys.
Login.resetDescription: Enter a new password for your OceanSkill account.
Login.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. Please sign in again.
Login.shortPassword: Your password must contain at least 6 characters.
Login.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

Auth.invalidConfirmation: The email confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
Auth.invalidReset: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
